name: planvokter-monorepo
description: npm workspaces root for @planvokter riotplan packages

scripts.build: npm run build:leaves && npm run build:mid && npm run build:upper && npm run build:top
scripts.build:leaves: npm run build -w packages/riotplan-verify -w packages/riotplan-format -w packages/riotplan-catalyst -w packages/riotplan-cloud -w packages/riotplan-templates
scripts.precommit: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
